Dialog.name: TRL_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 0}When you've collected all the Major Arcana cards that can appear in a day, {f 0 1 2}Arcana Burst{f 0 1 27} will occur, and you can acquire a Minor Arcana card of your choice.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: TRL_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 0}During Arcana Burst, {f 0 1 2}the ranks of the Minor Arcana cards that appear will increase{f 0 1 27} until you leave Tartarus for the day.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: TRL_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 0}Try activating Arcana Burst as often as possible to collect stronger Minor Arcana cards.[n]{f 1 1}
